parameters:
...? Something...from inside the jar...ugh, it stinks......! ......Why does the jar
in Mana's house smell like...semen...!
I probably won't get to eat Mana's cooking anymore... But I have Elly...

The room Mana wasn't using. There used to be many of her mother's belongings left
here, but at some point, it's been neatly cleaned up.

Now that she's grown up, it seems Mana has finally accepted her mother's death. It
appears she either buried the mementos at the grave or disposed of them... Mana
really is a strong girl........

There used to be a large number of magical tools left behind by Mana's mother, but
she must have taken them to the Royal City, because almost all of them are gone
now... But I don't remember seeing those tools in Mana's room.........
...Hah... Rubbing my glans against Kurone feels so good...♡
...I should wash this later. If Elly saw a place like this, she'd get mad at me...

...This bed is waiting for its master's return, but Mana can't go back to this
village anymore... I can't let that girl suffer like that too...

Mana's bookshelf still has a few books left, but she took most of them with her to
the Royal City. What remains here are only the ones she read until their edges were
worn thin.

The cupboard doesn't contain anything particularly eye-catching... It seems they took
all the important things to the Royal City... Huh? Oh, this is...!

Something nostalgic came out... It's a tattered bright red ribbon. It's something
Elly gave her as a birthday present a long time ago...

Back then, Mana was so, so happy... Even now, when I close my eyes, I can remember
that girl's smile... She was hugging the ribbon so carefully, looking so very
happy...

The fact that she didn't take this ribbon on her journey means Mana must have
intended to return to this village. For that girl, her memories with Elly are very
important.

Someday, I'll definitely come back to get this. Until then, please wait, Elly-chan...
I can almost hear Mana saying that...

A bed that no one ever used, yet it was neatly made. Mana had prepared it so that
guests could stay at any time.

It seems Elly has taken over and is keeping it clean... While I'm grateful for Elly's
kindness, I also feel guilty for letting her continue this task for a whole year...

...The mirror shows a healthy-looking me. Mana is no longer by my side... But as long
as I'm with Elly, that's enough.

Mana will surely be fine... A girl as excellent as her should find a new partner
right away... Mana going on adventures with someone other than me... ugh...♡
